title: Smoky Roasted American Potato Bowl
description: A romantic American dish featuring smoky roasted potatoes, soured cream and chive dip, and tagine-cooked flavors, served in a Korean brass bowl.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
Scrub the potatoes clean and dry them with a paper towel.
Cut the potatoes into 1-inch cubes and place them in a bowl.
Drizzle the olive oil over the potatoes and sprinkle with smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper, tossing to coat.
Spread the potatoes out in a single layer on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes.
While the potatoes are roasting, mix the soured cream and chives in a small bowl.
After 20 minutes, remove the potatoes from the oven and sprinkle with tagine spice blend, tossing to coat.
Return the potatoes to the oven and roast for an additional 15 minutes, or until they are tender and lightly charred.
Remove the potatoes from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes.
Serve the potatoes in a Korean brass bowl, topped with a dollop of the soured cream and chive dip.
